title: Xaero's Map Chest Tracker Integration
description: This mod lets you see the results of Chest Tracker in the Xaero's map.
body:
# Xaero's Map Chest Tracker Integration

This mod extends [Chest Tracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker) functionality, showing the results in [Xaero's Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map).

It is compatible with Xaero's Minimap, Better PVP, and their fair versions.

![In game waypoint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XhOTBzVR/images/b0f97f693cbc935937b0cb7d0ec7cf830b9da2db.png)

![Image of the map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XhOTBzVR/images/01b0c61dfda5ea9fc992536536093af1f701449d.png)

### Requirements:
* [ChestTracker](https://modrinth.com/mod/chest-tracker)
* [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
